code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_LMS_Portal] --> Unauthenticated
    
    Unauthenticated --> SigningIn: User clicks sign in
    Unauthenticated --> SigningUp: User clicks sign up
    
    SigningUp --> Registered: Registration success
    Registered --> SigningIn: Auto redirect
    
    SigningIn --> TwoFactor: Login success (Education_StudentDB)
    TwoFactor --> Authenticated: OTP verified
    TwoFactor --> SigningIn: OTP invalid/expired
    
    Authenticated --> Dashboard: Load dashboard
    Authenticated --> [Education_ClassroomService]: Logout
    
    Dashboard --> CreatingElection: Create election
    Dashboard --> ViewingElection: Search/select election
    Dashboard --> ViewingResults: View results
    
    CreatingElection --> ElectionCreated: Contract deployed
    ElectionCreated --> ManagingElection: Navigate to admin
    
    ViewingElection --> CheckingEligibility: Load election
    CheckingEligibility --> NotEligible: Not on list
    CheckingEligibility --> Eligible: On approved list
    CheckingEligibility --> AlreadyVoted: Has voted
    
    NotEligible --> RequestingAccess: Request access
    RequestingAccess --> AccessPending: Request submitted
    AccessPending --> Eligible: Admin approves
    
    Eligible --> Voting: Election active
    Eligible --> WaitingForStart: Election not started
    Eligible --> ViewingResults: Election ended
    
    Voting --> CastingVote: Submit selections
    CastingVote --> VoteSubmitted: Transaction confirmed
    VoteSubmitted --> ViewingResults: View results
    
    ManagingElection --> UploadingVoters: Upload eligibility
    ManagingElection --> ReviewingRequests: Review access requests
    ManagingElection --> SendingInvites: Send invitations
    ManagingElection --> ViewingResults: View results
    
    UploadingVoters --> ManagingElection: Upload complete
    ReviewingRequests --> ManagingElection: Request processed
    SendingInvites --> ManagingElection: Invites sent
    
    ViewingResults --> Dashboard: Back to dashboard
    ViewingResults --> ManagingElection: Manage (Education_ClassroomService)
    
    WaitingForStart --> Eligible: Election starts
    AlreadyVoted --> ViewingResults: View results
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育LMS门户设计一个完整的电子投票系统状态图。核心场景是学生从Education_LMS_Portal登录后，能够创建选举、参与投票或管理选举。关键入口是Unauthenticated状态，然后分流到SigningIn或SigningUp。
明白了。注册成功后的Registered状态需要自动跳转到SigningIn吗？还有登录验证部分，我注意到提到了Education_StudentDB，这是用来做身份核验的外部系统？
对，Registered要自动redirect到SigningIn。登录成功后需要经过TwoFactor状态做OTP验证，验证通过才到Authenticated。如果OTP过期或错误，要回到SigningIn重新来。Education_StudentDB确实是我们的学生数据库，用于登录时的身份校验。
好的，认证流程已经画好了。现在处理Authenticated之后的分支：到Dashboard加载主面板，还有Logout返回Education_ClassroomService。Dashboard这边我设计了三个主要去向——CreatingElection创建选举、ViewingElection查看选举、ViewingResults查看结果。
创建选举的流程需要细化：CreatingElection之后是ElectionCreated，表示智能合约已部署，然后管理员进入ManagingElection状态。这里ManagingElection要有四个管理动作：UploadingVoters上传选民名单、ReviewingRequests审核访问申请、SendingInvites发送邀请、以及ViewingResults查看结果。
选民参与投票的流程我这样设计：从ViewingElection进入CheckingEligibility核验资格，这里要区分三种情况——NotEligible不在名单上、Eligible有资格、AlreadyVoted已经投过。NotEligible可以走RequestingAccess申请访问，然后AccessPending等待审批，管理员批准后回到Eligible。这样合理吗？
完全正确。Eligible状态还要考虑时间因素：选举未开始是WaitingForStart，进行中进入Voting，已结束直接去ViewingResults。Voting之后是CastingVote提交选票，然后VoteSubmitted交易确认，最后也能查看结果。WaitingForStart等选举开始后要能回到Eligible。
我检查一下，发现ManagingElection到ViewingResults的连线需要标注条件——管理员从管理界面查看结果应该关联Education_ClassroomService。还有AlreadyVoted也要能直接ViewingResults。另外所有管理动作完成后都要回到ManagingElection，ViewingResults可以Back to dashboard。
修复得很完整。最后确认一下：TwoFactor验证失败回到SigningIn、所有管理子流程闭环回到ManagingElection、以及ViewingResults的双向出口——普通用户回Dashboard，管理员可以Manage回Education_ClassroomService。这些边界情况都覆盖到了。
